data.name: The link to the brand's home page.
data.value: The link to the brand's home page.

data.value: Allow User Adjust Nickname

data.name: Brand Home URL
data.value: Brand Home URL

data.name: Brand Name
data.value: Brand Name

data.name: ICP Number
data.value: ICP Number

data.name: Project Logo
data.value: Project Logo

data.name: Project Name
data.value: Project Name

data.name: The AI prompt for auto categorizing questions. Use {0} for content, {1} for metadata, {2} for answer, {3} for tags, {4} for explanation, and {5} for categories list.
data.value: The AI prompt for auto-categorising questions. Use {0} for content, {1} for metadata, {2} for answer, {3} for tags, {4} for explanation, and {5} for the categories list.

data.name: The AI prompt for auto tagging questions. Use {0} for type, {1} for category, {2} for content, {3} for answer, {4} for explanation, {5} for existing tags, and {6} for taxonomy instructions.
data.value: The AI prompt for auto-tagging questions. Use {0} for type, {1} for category, {2} for content, {3} for answer, {4} for explanation, {5} for existing tags, and {6} for taxonomy instructions.

data.name: The AI prompt for generating answers for blank-filling questions.
data.value: The AI prompt for generating answers for fill-in-the-blank questions.

data.name: The AI prompt for generating answers for choice questions.
data.value: The AI prompt for generating answers for multiple-choice questions.

data.name: The AI prompt for generating answers for subjective questions (Short Answer, Essay, Noun Explanation).
data.value: The AI prompt for generating answers for subjective questions (Short Answer, Essay, Noun Explanation).

data.name: The AI prompt for generating answers for true/false questions.
data.value: The AI prompt for generating answers for true/false questions.

data.name: The AI prompt for generating base explanations.
data.value: The AI prompt for generating base explanations.

data.name: The AI prompt for generating deep explanations.
data.value: The AI prompt for generating in-depth explanations.

data.name: The AI prompt for grading questions. Use {0} for content, {1} for standard answer, {2} for explanation, {3} for student answer, and {4} for max score.
data.value: The AI prompt for grading questions. Use {0} for content, {1} for standard answer, {2} for explanation, {3} for student answer, and {4} for maximum score.

data.name: The brand name displayed in the footer.
data.value: The brand name displayed in the footer.

data.name: The default system prompt for extracting knowledge from material.
data.value: The default system prompt for extracting knowledge from material.

data.name: The ICP license number for China mainland users. Leave empty to hide.
data.value: The ICP licence number for China mainland users. Leave blank to hide.

data.name: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.
data.value: The logo of the project displayed in the navbar and footer. Support jpg, png, svg.

data.name: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.
data.value: The name of the project displayed in the frontend.
